description: A feature ships broken because every test passed but functional coverage never reached the corner that exercises it.
body: Failure mode: the regression passes because the stimulus never drove the design into the untested corner, so the bug there is never triggered. Detection signals: green test results alongside an unhit coverpoint, a coverage report below target on a key feature, and a field bug in the uncovered scenario. Do not declare verification complete on passing tests while coverage holes remain. Safer fallback: add directed or better-constrained stimulus to hit the missing bins, or formally waive them with rationale, then re-measure coverage.
